name: roasting
description: 5-Color Harness execution engine for Korean business leaders. Auto-routes 68 white-collar artifact cases (email, board memo, investor letter, landing page, image-prompt set, hand-coded website, DART company brief, strategy memo, etc.) and produces output via BLACK Producer + RGSB Reviewer team with debate-driven scoring. PPT and landing-page cases auto-bind a slide_library template; the website-build case (p73) outputs a single hand-coded HTML file directly. Korean only.
